changelog: FIX: Exit button now actually exits to the Fire TV launcher instead of relaunching the app. v1.44.96–v1.44.98 used Activity.finish() which Fire TV would immediately undo (a known quirk that's specific to release builds + singleTask launch mode). Now uses finishAndRemoveTask() plus a clean process kill so Fire TV has nothing to resurrect.
Same fix applies to the Exit App button on the trial-ended lock screen.
